english: must always use a seat belt
description:
Kuljettaja = driver

ei tarvitse = does not need to

turvavyö = seat belt

--- Explanation ---

The driver must always wear a seat belt. Options saying 'does not need to' are wrong.

avustaja = assistant

liikuntavammainen = physically disabled

keskustelet = you speak / discuss

--- Explanation ---

Always address the customer directly, not only their assistant.

puhelin = phone

kädessä = in hand

ajon aikana = during driving

--- Explanation ---

Holding a phone while driving is not allowed, even without a passenger.

english: you make sure / take care of
description:
lapsi = child

turvavyö = seat belt

huoltaja = guardian

koko matkan ajan = for the entire trip

--- Explanation ---

A guardian's permission does not override the law. The driver must ensure a 14-year-old uses a seat belt.

pyörätuoli = wheelchair

Totean = I state / tell

avustan = I assist

oikeus = right

--- Explanation ---

Respect the customer's autonomy. They may transfer independently, and you help only if needed.

taksiyrittäjä = taxi entrepreneur

laatuvaatimukset = quality requirements

taksinkuljettaja = taxi driver

--- Explanation ---

Quality requirements apply to every taxi driver, including entrepreneurs who drive.

sairaalaasta = from a hospital

paarit = stretcher

turvavyöt = safety belts

vastuussa = responsible

--- Explanation ---

When transporting a patient on a stretcher from hospital, the driver is responsible for restraints.

taksinkuljettaja = taxi driver

jokainen = every

taksiluvan haltija = taxi licence holder

--- Explanation ---

Quality requirements apply to every taxi driver, not only licence holders or large firms.

Kuljettaja = driver

kielitaito = language skill

kommunikoimaan = to communicate

turvallisesti = safely

--- Explanation ---

Language skill means enough communication to get the customer safely to the right destination.

poliisiasemalle = police station

hurmalaassa / humalassa = intoxicated

erittäin humalassa = very intoxicated

--- Explanation ---

A severely intoxicated person needs police help or transport to a police station — not abandonment.

vaikutusalueella = within the affected area

asiakkaan kyytiin = customer into the taxi

sallittuun paikkaan = permitted place

kävellen = on foot / by walking

--- Explanation ---

You may not stop in a no-stopping zone. Park legally nearby and help the customer board if needed.

avustaja = assistant

saapuu paikalle = arrives on site

ei kykene huolehtimaan itsestään = cannot take care of themselves

--- Explanation ---

Do not leave a vulnerable customer alone. Wait until the assistant arrives.

tapahtumapaikalle = to the scene

ulosajanut auto = car that ran off the road

Pysähdyt = you stop

112 = emergency number

--- Explanation ---

Stop at the accident scene and call emergency services. Do not ignore a road accident.

english: on the back seat behind the front seat
description:
turvallisuuden vuoksi = for safety

kuljettajan vieressä = next to the driver

asiakas = customer

--- Explanation ---

For safety, the customer should sit on the rear seat behind the front passenger seat.

pyörätuoli = wheelchair

kiinnittäminen = securing / fastening

henkilökohtainen avustaja = personal assistant

vastuulla = responsibility

--- Explanation ---

Securing the wheelchair in the taxi is the taxi driver's responsibility.

sopimusajo = contract trip

kirjallinen sopimus = written contract

taksiliikenne = taxi traffic

--- Explanation ---

The taxi sign may be off only on pre-arranged contract trips with a written agreement.

vaatteet = clothes

Kuljettaja = driver

mukava = comfortable

pyytää apua = asks for help

--- Explanation ---

The driver should help ensure the customer is comfortable, including adjusting clothes when asked.

15 tuntia = 15 hours

tarkoituksenmukaisesti = appropriately

työnantaja = employer

--- Explanation ---

Extended 15-hour work is allowed only when work cannot be arranged otherwise appropriately.
